acceptance_criteria: All TDD tests pass on Windows + Linux.
prd_refs: PRD Â§9.2 Configuration files and directories (lines 1613-1659)
Â§9.2 lists the canonical file paths and environment variables.
Â§9.13 enumerates the TDD checklist items this task satisfies (default path resolution, `SLASHOPS_HOME` override, `SLASHOPS_CONFIG` override, `SLASHOPS_POLICY` override).
description: Provide a single source of truth for resolving SlashOps file locations: home directory, config path, policy path, history path, runs/backups directories, and project-config search root. The resolver respects environment overrides `SLASHOPS_HOME`, `SLASHOPS_CONFIG`, `SLASHOPS_POLICY`, and `SLASHOPS_PROJECT_CONFIG`, and works identically on Windows, macOS, Linux, and WSL under PowerShell 7+.
notes: Avoid `$env:USERPROFILE` â€” `$HOME` is set in PowerShell 7 on every platform.
Path comparisons must be case-insensitive on Windows but case-sensitive on Linux/macOS â€” use `[System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath` for normalisation, not string lower-casing.
steps: TDD: Default path resolution returns `~/.slashops/config.json` and `~/.slashops/policy.json`.
TDD: `SLASHOPS_HOME` override changes all default paths consistently.
TDD: `~` expansion uses `$HOME` (not `$env:USERPROFILE`) so behaviour matches across platforms.
TDD: Resolver returns absolute, normalised paths.
TDD: Resolver does not create files or directories â€” it is read-only.

Author `Private/Config/Get-ConfigPath.ps1`: a single function returning a `[pscustomobject]` with members `Home`, `Config`, `Policy`, `History`, `RunsDir`, `BackupsDir`, `CacheFile`, `ProjectConfig`. It honours environment overrides, expands `~`, and normalises with `[System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath` after `Resolve-Path -Force` where applicable.
Author `Public/Get-SlashOpsConfigPath.ps1` that delegates to the private function and supports `-Detailed` to return the full object versus the default config path string.
Add Pester tests for every TDD bullet using `TestDrive:` for any temporary roots.
name: [cfg-01] Resolve configuration paths and SLASHOPS_HOME overrides
